description: CompositionBlue melange T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has short sleeves, round neck, brand badge at the right hem and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironIf you have the denim gene in you, then this t-shirt is a great way to flaunt your love for the blue cloth. Team this T-shirt with jeans and canvas shoes, while the fabric keeps you fresh and sweat-free all day.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
